review_title: Efficient Time Tracking Made Easy with TimeBro
author: Bob D.
pros: I've been using TimeBro for my time tracking needs, and I must say, it's been a game changer. This software has truly made time tracking efficient and hassle-free for me. Not only does it help me keep track of my work hours effortlessly, but it also saves me valuable time that I can dedicate to more important tasks.One of the standout features of TimeBro is its user-friendly interface. Setting up projects and tracking time is a breeze, even for someone like me who isn't particularly tech-savvy. The intuitive design makes the entire process seamless and enjoyable.What really sets TimeBro apart, though, is the exceptional customer support. Whenever I've had a question or needed assistance, their team has been incredibly responsive and helpful. It's reassuring to know that if I encounter any issues, I can rely on their support to quickly resolve them.Overall, TimeBro has become an indispensable tool in my workflow. It simplifies time tracking, boosts my productivity, and the top-notch customer support is the cherry on top. I'm genuinely impressed with how it has improved my work efficiency. If you're looking for a reliable and user-friendly time tracking software, I highly recommend giving TimeBro a try.
cons: I still lose some time with the final export. I really need a chronological order of the time spent. It exports everything in order of the projects which is not how I'd like to get the final document. Bit of a hassle to manually do this in excel at the end. However, still saving time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It was easy to install and use. Grateful to have it.
author: LaDawn D.
pros: I was having issues tracking my time. Working for a consulting company has made this a critical part of my job. No other tool worked as well with automatic tracking as TimeBro. I pay for it myself and it is well worth the investment. I would love to see the rest of the company move in this direction. As long as there is an affordable single user option, I will always use this product.
cons: I have had some weird issues with my computer restarting or closing a Zoom or Teams meeting. I don't know why and it may not be related to Timebro at all. I am curious if the automatic tracking is what is causing the crash.

description: Terrible! I would never use this again, they’re a bunch of cheap cnts
author: Gupi M.
pros: I don’t have anything nice to say about the app, it’s shit at its purpose, and it’s worse to talk to the people behind the app.
cons: Worst customer service, they chase you to the end of the world even after you finish your subscription and cancel your cards they’ll send you debt collectors to get paid for the months you don’t use the app! Stay away!!!

review_title: Comprehensive time tracking with minimal overhead
description: I do a lot of consulting work for my clients which requires that I read through many documents and write reports. I needed a way to track how I spend in research and in writing and I needed to be able to split it out by client. What I love about timeBro is that it automatically tracks what I'm doing and shows the titles of the docs I'm reading or writing so I can easily categorise which client to bill.
author: Robin W.
pros: The automatic time-tracking is the best feature from my perspective. I have having to interrupt my flow in order to log my time. I love the way timeBro shows me the application I was working in as well as the title of the document.
cons: There are many additional features built into timeBro that I will never use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: timeBro is great for tracking time
author: Sophie C.
pros: Being able to assign activities to different projects is very helpful for me in completing my time sheet weekly.
cons: I wish it were possible to search keywords and assign projects automatically. I also wish there were a free version.

author: Kate M.
pros: Really easy to connect to calenders and tag time tracking against projects, to enable accurate time sheets and costings for clients, which in turn helps me accurately estimate my time for future clients
cons: I'd like it to have more automated functions, like being able to pull a weekly or monthly report rather than daily ones I then have to collate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I work for short periods on multiple items for multiple clients and without timebro, its easy to forget to log the time involved when I switch between, and lose hours. With this you won't. It is basic compared to the competition but the tracking itself is really accurate, which is the most important part (for me at least).
author: Tim A.
pros: Simple to installSimple to use,Rock steady automatic time tracking (I tried several of the competitors before deciding on timebro and its the most consistent by far if working on multiple projects and software)Tracks software and filenames so fairly easy to log time even if you leave it a few days before getting back to it.
cons: Options outside of tracking are pretty basicNo cloud-based backup of log or online version of it (as far as I can see)No cost and a budget tracking (inbuilt as far as I can see)Can be hard to categorise projects and logging the time against specifics within multiple projects can be laborious compared to competitors - that's largely down to the basic UI).Can occasionally just stop tracking (restart of the machine starts it again, but can be tricky if you are relying on it and dont spot it for a day)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: TimeBro saves me so much time and frustration!
description: I love this product and have suggested it to many of my clients.
author: Danielle R.
pros: Timebro helps me track every thing we need in the moment!
cons: It is not easy to download reports with editable fields

description: Great time tracker software for a legal practice.
author: Polly M.
pros: Very easy to use. Always running. Error proof. Great customer service.
cons: I have no complaints about the software. It lets me see my time easily and quickly.

review_title: timeBro keeps track of your work so you can accurately log time and bill for it
description: Totally great experience - and the customer support is amazing. For example, I had a request to pull task lists from Teamwork a little differently than how they were doing it, and they agreed to my request.. within just a couple of weeks, they built and deployed a feature that totally helped my workflow!
author: Rob W.
pros: It's great to be able to look back and see what I've done throughout the day. I work across many clients and many projects with many tasks. At the end of my day, I have a hard time remembering what I did.. timeBro helps remind me so that I can log my time correctly.
cons: Sometimes there feels like there's a slowness issue between timeBro and Outlook.

description: Do not recommend - all what seems to be better is severely impacted by general business practices. Take a look at their Google reviews.
author: Mathieu P.
pros: Simple to use overall, a UI that is not bad.
cons: Dishonest billing practices. Automatic renewal without notice of yearly subscription. To put it simple, take an alternative that will not charge behind your back.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have tried a TON of time management software, and this works the best for me, hands down. I switch between projects constantly all day, so this takes the guesswork out of trying to figure out how much time I spent on each one every day. It allows you to be as detailed (assigning specific tasks in projects) as you want (or don't want). I am a freelancer and different clients require different amounts of detail for billing - it's nice to NOT have to fill in all of those details if you don't need it. I love that TimeBro works on MY schedule and allows me to go in and assign projects and tasks after the fact. It has truly been a lifesaver for my billing!
author: Rebecca C.
pros: I love that TimeBro automatically tracks your time without you needing to set up ANYTHING. You can go back in and assign projects once you have some time, but it starts working immediately without you needing to do anything. It's awesome that it just runs in the background - I don't have to remember to start it or mark that I started a new project or anything. I can add it all in when I have the time.
cons: It would be nice to be able to view monthly data visually - like in a graph format. Also, to have the bar graph in "Statistics" show how much time is spent on each project every day, but these are very minor things. I really haven't noticed too many cons

review_title: Splendid solution for timekeeping for any business or company billing hours
description: I am a huge fan, I hate writing hours. Always forgetting minutes to bill without timeBro.
author: Wouter V.
pros: The tracking of all MS Office software activities is remarkable. And glad Spotify or Itunes is ignored.
cons: Like a feature to be able to copy projects. Most project have the same activities. And a a consultant I have multiple projects monthly. Takes time to create a new project which only the customers name difference.

author: Scott D.
pros: Tracking my time is crucial to my business for billing and estimating. timeBro tracks every minute so I don't have to. Simple reporting makes it easy to see how my time was spent and what software I was using. Highly recommended.
cons: The only issue I have, albeit minor, is I wish there were templates that could be set up when creating a project. I break a project into several tasks and adding them every time is redundant. Let me save the tasks for next time.

author: Jeroen C.
pros: TimeBro is an excellent application for time tracking. It is fast and easy and links to Harvest which we use for our time management and administration.
cons: I would like TimeBro to be even more automated: predict the projects from the previous data.

review_title: Time tracking has never been this easy for me
description: The monthly cost is now more than covered by lost time we can now charge for. Highly recommended.
author: Jon B.
pros: Throughout my 20 year career in the industry, I have always struggled with timesheets. They always seem to get forgotten, and it's difficult to back track. With TimeBro I can forget about this as it does all the hard work for me. I can leave my time sheets for a week or two and I can still easily track my time, to ensure that I can charge precisely and honestly with my clients.
cons: Can't think of any cons, maybe the Asana integration can be a bit confusing and temperamental
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Silvija S.
pros: Automatic tracking Export to different projects
cons: No way to track tasks or subtasks within a projectSlows down my computerSometimes it doesn't track activity

description: It really helped me in tracking the time spent on projects and also provides a good facility on optimising the time and enhances transparency with clients.
author: Anand J.
pros: It tracks the web based email activity also which is very useful.
cons: It has no facility to capture actual time spent on calls and Team meetings except the schedule times

author: Avrohom K.
pros: timeBro makes it easy to keep track of how you spent your time, including web activity
cons: I would like a way to approve multiple entries at once and a way to add the time without adding to a particular project (these features may be on here, but if they are, they aren't intuitive).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great for time tracking and easy to use
description: I think using timeBro has been great and really useful. It makes keeping track of what I’ve done easy and being able to add comments helps for me to got back and see what I did on each day
author: Finn C.
pros: It allows me to keep track of my work done which is extremely useful when doing freelance/consultancy work
cons: You have to set up projects to track time and can’t just do it without a project assigned
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Do you have the time Bro?
description: It works for what I need it to work as. But It is time consuming to go through and confirm what is being tracked.
author: Amy C.
pros: I liked that it just runs in the background and has the comparison against calendars and what software or apps you are using.
cons: I don't like that emails are lumped together. Since I jump from project to project when handling emails. So I have to make assumptions. I also do not like that it does not track time on your phone so that calls and other tasks can be managed appropriately including drive time. It just says "offline".

author: Megan E.
pros: Good product, does what it says on the tin. Time tracking and customisable projects and activities are useful for invoicing multiple clients.
cons: The calendar function is fiddly and if you want to pull and activity to a longer timeslot it is a little buggy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: offline software for tracking the right time with the rigt focus
author: Lex R.
pros: What i like the most of automaticaly tracking my time is tha i can see in wich window i am working. it gives me a lot of insight in my own behavior. Integration with calenders. and classify time on projects specific
cons: i would like to intergrate my android phone use
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Wim W.
pros: I no longer loose time and am able to correctly bill my time.
cons: Not really any cons up to now. Does everything I expect it to do.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: No more writing notes at the end of the day to remember which projects I worked on.
author: Fabio V.
pros: As easy as it gets. Automatically tracks all your activity.
cons: When booting my computer, I've had some crashes of timeBro.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
